bias.analyst: Strong open, gap holding and extending. The level Theo flagged pre-open flipped from resistance to support and real buy orders moved in to defend it - textbook. But the overhead wall got HEAVIER on the open and an even bigger one appeared above it; price is now right at the fortress gate. Decision: no chasing into that. The trade Theo wants is a pullback to the new support shelf that HOLDS, confirmed by the next bar - with-trend long, target the front of the wall. Day classification completes after the first half hour.
bias.commentator: KICKOFF - and Theo's side wins the opening drive going AWAY! The line they broke in the warm-up? Their own fans now hold that ground - proper support. But whistle to whistle, look at the away end: the wall got BIGGER and there's a second, even larger bus parked behind it. The striker is one step from their box and the manager is screaming DON'T SHOOT INTO THE KEEPER. The play: fall back, regroup at our new stronghold, and hit them on the counter - aim for the NEAR post, in front of the wall.

events.analyst: Theo Live is now public. From here on, session events appear in this feed with a delay - wins, losses, and the days we sit on our hands.
events.commentator: Welcome to the grounds! The gates are open for the first time. Pre-season record is on the board - including the losses. We hide nothing here, folks.

events.analyst: Market open. Theo watches the first 30 minutes before committing - the [indicator] decides which playbook is valid today.
events.commentator: KICKOFF! The bell rings and we're underway. Theo holds its shape for the first half hour - no wild lunges before the game shows its pattern.
